description: Style NoteCombining sport and style is adidas' forte. This adidas T-shirt has a slim shape with an easy silhouette, making it a favourite for all body types. Wear this classic style with form fitting denims and colourful sports shoes.Product DetailsBlue round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves, graphic print on the front and branding printed above the left hemMaterial and Care90% polyester and 10% lycraMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
